basic_details.job_title: ICGEB Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for JRF, Research Scientist and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: International Centre for Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology (ICGEB)
basic_details.post_name: Research Positions in Structural Parasitology Group
basic_details.short_information: International Centre for Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology (ICGEB) Research Positions in Structural Parasitology Group Notification 2026 has been released on 01 June 2026 on the official website icgeb.org. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the ICGEB Research Positions in Structural Parasitology Group Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor degree (B.Tech.)/Master's degree (M.Sc/M.Tech) in Life Sciences or related discipline, Doctoral degree in Science or Master's degree in Life Sciences from a recognized university or equivalent, Doctoral degree in Science or Master's degree in Life Sciences from a recognized university or equivalent with seven years of experience in R&D, M.Sc. in Life Sciences / Microbiology / Biotechnology / Molecular Biology / Medical Laboratory Technology or M.Tech in Biotechnology or related fields
qualification.details: Senior Project Assistant: Bachelor degree (B.Tech.)/Master's degree (M.Sc/M.Tech) in Life Sciences or related discipline. Preference will be given to candidates with experience in animal studies and Larvicidal studies (or) Preference will be given to candidates with experience in AI/ML-driven drug discovery approaches. Research Scientist-I (RS-I): Doctoral degree in Science or Master's degree in Life Sciences from a recognized university or equivalent and demonstrate relevant research experience. Preference will be given to candidates with experience in animal studies and Larvicidal studies (or) Preference will be given to candidates with experience in AI/ML-driven drug discovery approaches. Research Scientist-III (RS-III): Doctoral degree in Science or Master's degree in Life Sciences from a recognized university or equivalent and seven years of experience in R&D in academic institutions or S&T organizations and scientific activities and services. Preference will be given to candidates with experience in animal studies and Larvicidal studies (or) Preference will be given to candidates with experience in AI/ML-driven drug discovery approaches. Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate: M.Sc. in Life Sciences / Microbiology / Biotechnology / Molecular Biology / Medical Laboratory Technology or M.Tech in Biotechnology or related fields. CSIR-NET / DBT / GATE / ICMR fellowship desirable. Preference will be given to candidates with experience in bacterial cell culture, mammalian cell culture, prokaryotic and eukaryotic recombinant protein expression, virology, and molecular biotechnology techniques.

salary_details.pay_scale: Fellowship as per DBT/ICMR norms, Fellowship as per the norms of funding agencies
salary_details.details: Senior Project Assistant: Fellowship as per DBT/ICMR norms Research Scientist-I (RS-I): Fellowship as per DBT/ICMR norms Research Scientist-III (RS-III): Fellowship as per DBT/ICMR norms Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate: Fellowship as per the norms of funding agencies

selection_process: cover letter and referees Online Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ICGEB Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ICGEB Research Positions?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the ICGEB Research Positions is 15th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Research Positions at ICGEB?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies announced for the Research Positions in the Structural Parasitology Group at the International Centre for Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology (ICGEB).

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for ICGEB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is via Email. Candidates need to send their applications and required documents to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What are the eligibility criteria for the Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate post?
faq.answer: For the Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate post, candidates need an M.Sc. in Life Sciences/Microbiology/Biotechnology/Molecular Biology/Medical Laboratory Technology or M.Tech in Biotechnology or related fields. A CSIR-NET/DBT/GATE/ICMR fellowship is desirable.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for ICGEB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive at ICGEB.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these research positions?
faq.answer: The selection process involves two stages: initial shortlisting based on CV, cover letter, and referees, followed by an online interview for the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions offered are contractual in nature. This means the employment is for a fixed term as per the project requirements.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for ICGEB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is highly recommended to download and read it thoroughly.

faq.question: Q9. What is the salary structure for the Research Scientist posts?
faq.answer: The salary for the Research Scientist-I and Research Scientist-III posts will be as per the norms of DBT/ICMR. Specific details will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Does ICGEB offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Information regarding age relaxation for reserved categories is not explicitly detailed here. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for specific details on age limits and relaxations.

faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the ICGEB Research Positions is 15th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.
